name: Quest Administradora General de Fondos - Quest Doble Impacto Fondo De Inversion
summary: Quest Administradora General de Fondos - Quest Doble Impacto Fondo De Inversion invests in companies that have both a financial and a social or environmental impact. Quest Administradora General de Fondos manages the fund. It targets businesses that generate positive change alongside competitive financial returns.
